title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.651 - Private partner to provide plan, contents
text:
227.651.  Private partner to provide plan, contents. — The private partner shall provide the commission a detailed disadvantaged business enterprise participation plan that conforms to commission reporting requirements for the federal disadvantaged business enterprise program under federal law and regulations on federal-aid highway projects.  The plan shall also provide information describing the experience of the private partner in meeting disadvantaged business enterprise participation goals, how the private partner will meet the department's disadvantaged business participation goals, and such other qualifications the commission considers to be in the best interest of the state.
(L. 2006 H.B. 1380)
